title: https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cyclothymia
content:
https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cyclothymia

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Atypical_depression

Constant marijuana use - when I don’t use it, my stomach hurts, and I experience anxiety
Can’t stop using substances
Been abusing food since I was a child, binge eating
Unrealistic attachments to friends growing up
Was diagnosed Bipolar
Anxiety attacks one a week
Obsessive behaviors, organizing, tidy
Compulsive behaviors
Seek out worse drugs when depressed
Can’t maintain jobs long term
Sometimes I won’t shower for days
And sometimes I just shave my head
